evidence_hint: src/llm.ts:33-37 — `if (!res.ok) return null;` then `} catch { return null; }` in makeOpenAIAdapter.classify; abort/timeout, non-2xx status+body, and JSON-parse failures all collapsed into bare `null` with zero logging.
